description_long: This is a rustic stone cabin with a prominent gable roof made of weathered wooden planks, giving it a traditional countryside appearance. The exterior walls are constructed from irregularly textured stone, lending a robust and earthy feel. A large stone chimney rises along one side of the cabin, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside. The front facade features a small wooden porch with steps leading up to a single door, accompanied by a rectangular window. Additional windows are sparsely distributed on the other sides, providing limited but functional natural light. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, suitable for residential use in a rural or semi-urban setting.
description: A rustic stone cabin with a gable wooden roof, stone chimney, small porch, and sparse rectangular windows. The structure is compact and robust, exuding a traditional countryside charm.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the stone chimney running up the center of the wall and the textured stone exterior beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: The front view shows the wooden porch with steps, the main entrance door, and a single window to the right of the door.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays a single rectangular window and the stone wall, with the chimney visible at the roof's peak.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals two windows of different sizes spaced apart on the stone wall, with the chimney visible at the far end.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from wooden planks, featuring slight overhangs on all sides
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with one window on the front facade, one on each side wall, and two windows of different sizes on the rear wall; all windows are rectangular and spaced apart
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed via a small porch with steps
